items.title: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
items.dek: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.
items.body: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Africa made to look like fools after World Cup visa issues, says minister
items.dek: According to media reports, the team's departure for Mexico on Sunday has been delayed due to an "administrative bungle".
items.body: According to media reports, the team's departure for Mexico on Sunday has been delayed due to an "administrative bungle".
items.author: IriLine Desk
